overview: ICES is a modern HR & Skills Management Platform built on the Internet Computer. It provides a complete HR solution with employee management, role-based access control, and analytics dashboard for Integrated Consulting & Engineering Solutions.
features: Internet Identity login with role-based access (HR Admin, HR Manager, Manager, Employee, Direction)
Full employee CRUD with profiles, departments, contract info, and employment status
Employee search and filtering by department, status, and role
Real-time dashboard with employee counts and department statistics
Responsive HR SaaS design with collapsible sidebar navigation
Production-ready multi-tenant architecture with stable Motoko storage
